title: Moosend vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Flodesk?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to Moosend is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
